name: Lemon Curd (Microwave)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place butter, sugar, juice and zest together in a 4-cup glass measure.
2. Cover tightly with microwave plastic wrap.
3. Cook at 100% power for 4 minutes.
4. Remove from oven, uncover and stir well.
5. Whisk 1/4 cup of lemon mixture into the eggs to warm them.
6. Whisking constantly, pour egg mixture back into remaining lemon mixture.
7. Cook uncovered at 100% power for 2 minutes.
8. Remove from oven and whisk until smooth.
9. Cook for an additional 2 minutes.
10. Remove from oven and immediately pour into the bowl of a food processor.
11. Process for 30 seconds until smooth.
12. Cool before serving.
